subject: Fermi GBM trigger 150907763 is not a GRB
body:
P. Veres reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 463342761/150907763
at 18:19:17.07 UT on the 7 September 2015, tentatively classified as a
GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to a particle
event."
